close_reason: Added opts parameter with :now option to expired?/2 and remaining_ms/2
description:
## File
`apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/expirable.ex`

## Current Code
```elixir
def expired?(%{expires_at: exp}) do
  System.system_time(:millisecond) >= exp
end

def remaining_ms(%{expires_at: exp}) do
  max(0, exp - System.system_time(:millisecond))
end
```

## Required Changes
Add optional `now` parameter with default:
```elixir
def expired?(struct, now \\ System.system_time(:millisecond))
def expired?(%{expires_at: exp}, now), do: now >= exp

def remaining_ms(struct, now \\ System.system_time(:millisecond))
def remaining_ms(%{expires_at: exp}, now), do: max(0, exp - now)
```

## Impact
- `Lease.expired?/1` and `Lease.remaining_ms/1` delegate to this module
- `QueueLease.expired?/1` and `QueueLease.remaining_ms/1` delegate to this module
- Delegates need to be updated to accept and pass the `now` parameter
title: Add :now injection to Expirable module
